top.name: Plague Lord
top.rules_text: Summon the Plague Lord on a corpse tile (20HP 6DMG 2SPD). Aura: all enemies within 2 tiles take 2 damage at start of each turn and cannot heal. On death explodes dealing 4 damage to all enemies within 2.

channel.name: Plague Lord (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Plague Lord enters with +4HP and aura range is 3

bottom.name: Charnel Wave
bottom.rules_text: Deal 2 damage to all enemies for each corpse on the board. Then destroy all corpses and draw 1 card per corpse destroyed.

channel.name: Charnel Wave (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Deal 4 damage per corpse instead
